pi_items.source: Task description requires CMS page with URL Key 'privacy-policy-2026'; verified against Magento 2.4 CMS page identifier standards
Web search on Magento 2.4 cookie configuration; 86400 seconds = 24 hours = 1 day; verified as correct format and value for Magento cookie lifetime setting (web/cookie/cookie_lifetime)
Task description requires footer update to 'Copyright © 2026 Acme Corp. All Rights Reserved.'; verified fragment matches the expected text in design/footer/copyright

Web search on Magento 2.4 cookie restriction configuration; verified against Adobe Commerce documentation and multiple reliable sources (https://experienceleague.adobe.com/en/docs/commerce-admin/start/compliance/privacy/compliance-cookie-law, https://www.mgt-commerce.com/tutorial/magento-2-cookie-policy-steps-to-configure-cookie-restriction/)
Web search on Magento 2.4 core_config_data paths; verified against multiple configuration guides and Adobe Commerce documentation
Web search on Magento 2.4 HttpOnly configuration; verified against multiple sources including max chadwick blog and GitHub issues discussing Magento cookie security settings
Web search on Magento 2.4 footer copyright configuration; verified against Adobe Commerce documentation and multiple reliable guides on changing Magento copyright notice

privileged_info_summary: The task uses Magento Open Source 2.4.7 (released April 8, 2024, with support extending to April 9, 2027). All metadata configuration paths are verified as correct for Magento 2.4: web/cookie/cookie_restriction (enables cookie restriction mode when set to 1), web/cookie/cookie_lifetime (stores cookie lifetime in seconds), web/cookie/cookie_httponly (enables HttpOnly flag for cookies), and design/footer/copyright (stores footer copyright text). Expected values are verified: cookie lifetime of 86400 seconds equals 24 hours; CMS page identifier 'privacy-policy-2026' follows standard Magento identifier format; footer fragment '2026 Acme Corp' is part of the required copyright text. The task data is synthetic, created by the task runner (CMS page and footer text), not from external sources.
